channel.title: 2026-04-16 AI × Science 文献日报 RSS
channel.description: 2026-04-16 当天筛选出的 AI × 物理 / 化学 / 材料交叉文献 RSS。

item.title: AlphaCNOT: Learning CNOT Minimization with Model-Based Planning
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Jacopo Cossio, Daniele Lizzio Bosco, Riccardo Romanello, Giuseppe Serra, Carla Piazza
arXiv:2604.13812v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Quantum circuit optimization is a central task in Quantum Computing, as current Noisy Intermediate Scale Quantum devices suffer from error propagation that often scales with the number of operations. Among quantum operations, the CNOT gate is of fundamental importance, being the only 2-qubit gate in the universal Clifford+T set. The problem of CNOT gates minimization has been addressed by heuristic algorithms such as the well-known Patel-Markov-Hayes (PMH) for linear reversible synthesis (i.e., CNOT minimization with no topological constraints), and more recently by Reinforcement Learning (RL) based strategies in the more complex case of topology-aware synthesis, where each CNOT can act on a subset of all qubits pairs. In this work we introd…

item.title: Automatic Charge State Tuning of 300 mm FDSOI Quantum Dots Using Neural Network Segmentation of Charge Stability Diagram
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Peter Samaha, Amine Torki, Ysaline Renaud, Sam Fiette, Emmanuel Chanrion, Pierre-Andre Mortemousque, Yann Beilliard
arXiv:2604.13662v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Tuning of gate-defined semiconductor quantum dots (QDs) is a major bottleneck for scaling spin qubit technologies. We present a deep learning (DL) driven, semantic-segmentation pipeline that performs charge auto-tuning by locating transition lines in full charge stability diagrams (CSDs) and returns gate voltage targets for the single charge regime. We assemble and manually annotate a large, heterogeneous dataset of 1015 experimental CSDs measured from silicon QD devices, spanning nine design geometries, multiple wafers, and fabrication runs. A U-Net style convolutional neural network (CNN) with a MobileNetV2 encoder is trained and validated through five-fold group cross validation. Our model achieves an overall offline tuning success of 80.…

item.title: Finding and characterising physical states of Euclidean Abelianized loop quantum gravity using neural quantum states
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Hanno Sahlmann, Waleed Sherif
arXiv:2604.14067v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: We study physical (near-kernel of constraints) states of 4-d Euclidean loop quantum gravity in Smolin's weak coupling limit on the complete graph K₅ using variational Monte Carlo with neural network quantum states. We investigate the Hamilton constraint hatH in the ordering proposed by Thiemann, as well as hatH^dagger and hatH+hatH^dagger. We find that the variational optimisation selects distinct solution families for hatH and hatH^dagger across several considered cutoffs on the kinematical degrees of freedom. The solution family of hatH is flat on all minimal loops and has non-vanishing volume expectation values. Its edge-charge marginals delocalise with increasing cutoff, which indicates they are approximations to solutions that are non…

item.title: Mitigating Barren Plateaus in Quantum Denoising Diffusion Probabilistic Model
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Haipeng Cao, Kaining Zhang, Dacheng Tao, Zhaofeng Su
arXiv:2512.06695v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Quantum generative models exploit quantum superposition and entanglement to enhance learning efficiency for both classical and quantum data. Recently, inspired by classical diffusion frameworks, the quantum denoising diffusion probabilistic model (QuDDPM) has emerged as a powerful tool for learning correlated noise models, many-body phases, and topological data structure. However, we demonstrate that QuDDPM's efficacy is currently restricted to small-scale systems (typically łe 5 qubits). As the system size increases, a severe barren plateau (BP) problem emerges, fundamentally limiting the model's scalability. We provide rigorous theoretical proofs and experimental validation to identify the origin of this BP, distinct from previously kn…

item.title: 谱方法：对机器学习至关重要，对量子计算机自然而然？
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Vasilis Belis, Joseph Bowles, Rishabh Gupta, Evan Peters, Maria Schuld
该文论证量子计算机有望为机器学习开辟新路径，尤其指出谱方法——即学习、正则化或以其他方式操控机器学习模型傅里叶频谱的技术——在量子计算平台上往往具有天然优势。作者讨论了量子傅里叶变换等量子 routine 如何更直接、更资源高效地设计模型的谱性质，并分析了其在深度学习、支持向量机和卷积神经网络等背景下的潜力。

item.title: Three-dimensional photon transport in spinodal photocatalytic aerogels: how bicontinuous morphology controls kinetic rate constants
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Renaud A. L. Vallée
arXiv:2604.13929v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Porous monolithic photocatalysts based on anatase TiO2 in silica aerogels are promising for air purification. Their bicontinuous spinodal architecture offers high surface area and strong light scattering. However, extracting intrinsic kinetic rates requires accurate optical models. Current methods replace the complex 3D pore network with a homogeneous 1D slab, an approximation whose error is unknown for spinodal geometries. We combine 3D spinodal masks from Cahn-Hilliard simulations with GPU Monte Carlo photon transport to quantify this. We introduce a solid-phase fluence estimator that accounts for catalytic site distribution, comparing it to volume averages and diffusion approximations. The solid phase receives 50% more photons than volu…

item.title: Structure-preserving Koopman model predictive control for closed-loop stabilisation of memristive neural dynamics
item.description:
📚 Preprints
👤 XuJiang Tang, QiongLin Li
Closed-loop neurostimulation for pathological neural oscillations requires controllers that are fast, constraint-aware, and robust to the strong nonlinearities inherent in excitable neural membranes. We develop a Koopman operator framework for model predictive control of a four-state memristive Hindmarsh–Rose neuron, a biophysical model that captures electromagnetic induction, coexisting attractors, and chaotic bursting. The key methodological contribution is a structure-preserving dictionary design based on iterated Lie derivatives of the governing vector field: instead of choosing basis functions ad hoc, the dictionary is constructed analytically from the polynomial structure of the neural dynamics, yielding a compact 13-dimensional observable space. A truncation error theorem quantifie…

item.title: Thermal conductivities of monolayer graphene oxide from machine learning molecular dynamics simulations
item.description:
📚 The Journal of Chemical Physics Current Issue
Graphene oxide (GO) exhibits rich chemical heterogeneity that strongly influences its structural, thermal, and mechanical properties, yet quantitatively linking reduction chemistry to heat transport remains challenging. In this study, we develop a machine-learned neuroevolution potential (NEP) trained on an existing density functional theory dataset [El-Machachi et al. , Angew. Chem., Int. Ed. 63 , e202410088 (2024)], achieving reasonable accuracy at a computational cost much lower than the existing machine-learned and empirical potentials. Leveraging this potential, we perform large-scale molecular dynamics (MD) simulations to model the thermal reduction of GO across realistic structural domains. Using the homogeneous nonequilibrium MD method with a proper quantum-statistical correction…

item.title: Machine learning accelerates analysis of fusion materials
item.description:
📚 Physics News
Tungsten's superior performance in extreme environments makes it a leading candidate for plasma-facing components (PFCs) in fusion reactors, but the ultra-high heat can damage its microscopic structure and lead to component failure. Scanning electron microscopy (SEM) can capture and quantify these microstructure changes, but assembling a sufficiently large dataset of SEM imagery is expensive and logistically challenging.

item.title: 融合深度强化学习与基于智能体仿真以探索对抗信息失序的策略
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Luigi Lomasto, Andrea Camoia, Alfonso Guarino, Nicola Lettieri, Delfina Malandrino, Rocco Zaccagnino
该研究整合数据驱动与模型驱动两种思路，探索遏制社交媒体上信息失序传播的策略。具体而言，作者构建了一个基于智能体的仿真模型来科学复现虚假新闻动态及遏制策略的效应，并引入深度强化学习以自动学习最优的辟谣策略，从而更好地缓解错误信息的扩散。

item.title: Temperature-dependent infrared dielectric response of LiF via machine learning molecular dynamics
item.description:
📚 Phys. Rev. B
👤 Ziyue Zhou, Wei-Zhe Yuan, and Yangyu Guo
Author(s): Ziyue Zhou, Wei-Zhe Yuan, and Yangyu Guo The prediction of infrared dielectric function of strongly anharmonic crystals at elevated temperatures remains a nontrivial task. In this study, we target this challenge via Green-Kubo molecular dynamics based on a machine learning potential trained from first-principles data using LiF as a prototy… [Phys. Rev. B 113, 134308] Published Thu Apr 16, 2026

item.title: NEPMaker: Active learning of neuroevolution machine learning potential for large cells
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Junjie Wang, Shuning Pan, Haoting Zhang, Qiuhan Jia, Chi Ding, Zheyong Fan, Jian Sun
arXiv:2604.13848v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Machine learning potentials (MLPs) achieve near first-principles accuracy but often fail for atomic environments outside the training distribution. Active learning can mitigate this limitation; however, its application to large-scale simulations is hindered by the prohibitive cost of labeling entire configurations. Here, we develop a D-optimality-driven active learning framework for the neuroevolution potential (NEP) implemented within the GPUMD package, named NEPMaker. Extrapolative atomic environments are identified on-the-fly and embedded into locally periodic structures, where boundary atoms are optimized to remain close to the training distribution. This strategy enables large-scale simulations to directly contribute to dataset construc…

item.title: 地质力学启发的井眼轨迹预测框架：融合第一性原理运动学与门控循环网络的严格推导
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Shubham Kumar, Anshuman Sahoo
该工作建立了地质力学启发的、数据驱动的井眼轨迹预测框架。基于Gullfaks油田14口井的LAS测井和井斜数据，将岩石物理测井作为钻探动力学力学性质的代理变量。从向量微积分和微分几何第一性原理严格推导了平均角法和狗腿严重度等井眼运动学模型；核心预测模型为门控循环单元（GRU）网络，文中给出了前向传播和反向传播的完整逐步推导。

item.title: Depth-Resolved Coral Reef Thermal Fields from Satellite SST and Sparse In-Situ Loggers Using Physics-Informed Neural Networks
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Alzayat Saleh, Mostafa Rahimi Azghadi
arXiv:2604.13131v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Satellite sea surface temperature (SST) products underpin global coral bleaching monitoring, yet they measure only the ocean skin. Corals inhabit depths from the shallows to beyond 20 metres, where temperatures can be 1-3degC cooler than the surface; applying satellite SST uniformly to all depths therefore overestimates subsurface thermal stress. We present a physics-informed neural network (PINN) that fuses NOAA Coral Reef Watch SST with sparse in-situ temperature loggers within the one-dimensional vertical heat equation, enforcing SST as a hard surface boundary condition and jointly learning effective thermal diffusivity (kappa) and light attenuation (Kd). Validated across four Great Barrier Reef sites (30 holdout experiments), the PINN ac…

item.title: On phase separation and crystallization of Ge-rich GeSbTe alloys from atomistic simulations with a machine learning interatomic potential
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Omar Abou El Kheir, Dario Baratella, Marco Bernasconi
arXiv:2604.13843v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: We developed a machine learning interatomic potential (MLIP) for Ge-rich GeSbTe alloys of interest for applications in phase change memories embedded in microcontrollers. The MLIP was generated by fitting with a neural network method a large database of energies and forces computed within density functional theory of elemental, binary, stoichiometric and non-stoichiometric ternary alloys in the Ge-Sb-Te phase diagram. The MLIP is demonstrated to be highly transferable to large regions of the phase diagram around the compositions included in the dataset. The MLIP is then exploited to simulate the crystallization with phase separation of three Ge-rich alloys on the Ge-Sb₂Te₃ and Ge- Ge₂Sb₂Te₅ tie-lines that correspond to the set process of the…

item.title: 基于神经网络的肢体运动学分类中肌电信号时域、频域和时频域特征的比较评估
item.description:
📚 Preprints
👤 Khushboo Danish, Ali Asghar, Amenah Abul Mujeeb, Dr. Imran Khan Niazi
现代假肢通过整合肌电信号（EMG）实现自然运动的实时控制，而控制效果高度依赖于准确的特征提取与鲁棒的机器学习分类器。该研究对时域、频域和时频域三类EMG特征进行了比较分析，采集了8名健康男性在5种手部姿势和4种手臂位置下的表面肌电与针肌电数据，并采用窄神经网络评估了固定手臂位置与固定手部姿势两种条件下的分类精度。

item.title: Adaptive Learning via Off-Model Training and Importance Sampling for Fully Non-Markovian Optimal Stochastic Control. Complete version
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Dorival Leão, Alberto Ohashi, Simone Scotti, Adolfo M. D da Silva
arXiv:2604.13147v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: This paper studies continuous-time stochastic control problems whose controlled states are fully non-Markovian and depend on unknown model parameters. Such problems arise naturally in path-dependent stochastic differential equations, rough-volatility hedging, and systems driven by fractional Brownian motion. Building on the discrete skeleton approach developed in earlier work, we propose a Monte Carlo learning methodology for the associated embedded backward dynamic programming equation. Our main contribution is twofold. First, we construct explicit dominating training laws and Radon--Nikodym weights for several representative classes of non-Markovian controlled systems. This yields an off-model training architecture in which a fixed synth…

item.title: Enhancing Event Reconstruction in Hyper-Kamiokande with Machine Learning: A ResNet Implementation
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Andrew Atta, Nick Prouse, Shuoyu Chen, Kimihiro Okumura, Patrick de Perio, Eric Thrane, Phillip Urquijo
arXiv:2604.13503v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: The forthcoming Hyper-Kamiokande experiment requires substantially larger Monte Carlo datasets than previous experiments to satisfy stringent systematic-uncertainty requirements. While traditional maximum-likelihood reconstruction provides high-quality results, its per-event computational cost makes processing these large samples increasingly impractical. We demonstrate a neural-network-based reconstruction approach for the Hyper-Kamiokande far detector using simulated data. Single-particle events with kinetic energies from the Cherenkov threshold up to 2 GeV are propagated through the detector, with PMT charge and timing information mapped to 190×189 two-channel images serving as inputs to ResNet models in the WatChMaL framework. These mo…

item.title: Hardware-Efficient Neuro-Symbolic Networks with the Exp-Minus-Log Operator
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Eymen Ipek
arXiv:2604.13871v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Deep neural networks (DNNs) deliver state-of-the-art accuracy on regression and classification tasks, yet two structural deficits persistently obstruct their deployment in safety-critical, resource-constrained settings: (i) opacity of the learned function, which precludes formal verification, and (ii) reliance on heterogeneous, library-bound activation functions that inflate latency and silicon area on edge hardware. The recently introduced Exp-Minus-Log (EML) Sheffer operator, eml(x, y) = exp(x) - ln(y), was shown by Odrzywolek (2026) to be sufficient - together with the constant 1 - to express every standard elementary function as a binary tree of identical nodes. We propose to embed EML primitives inside conventional DNN architectures, yi…

item.title: 物理引导神经网络在太阳辐照度预测中超越自注意力机制
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Mohammed Ezzaldin Babiker Abdullah, Rufaidah Abdallah Ibrahim Mohammed
该研究提出一种轻量级的物理信息混合CNN-BiLSTM框架，用于全球水平辐照度（GHI）预测。模型以15个工程化物理特征（包括晴空指数与太阳天顶角）为引导，而非仅依赖原始历史数据，并通过贝叶斯优化进行超参数调优。基于苏丹NASA POWER数据的实验表明，该方法的RMSE为19.53 W/m²，显著优于复杂的基于注意力的基线模型（RMSE 30.64 W/m²），挑战了当前“复杂度优先”的范式。

item.title: Physics-Informed Neural Networks for Solving Derivative-Constrained PDEs
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Kentaro Hoshisashi, Carolyn E Phelan, Paolo Barucca
arXiv:2604.13723v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Physics-Informed Neural Networks (PINNs) recast PDE solving as an optimisation problem in function space by minimising a residual-based objective, yet many applications require additional derivative-based relations that are just as fundamental as the governing equations. In this paper, we present Derivative-Constrained PINNs (DC-PINNs), a general framework that treats constrained PDE solving as an optimisation guided by a minimum objective function criterion where the physics resides in the minimum principle. DC-PINNs embed general nonlinear constraints on states and derivatives, e.g., bounds, monotonicity, convexity, incompressibility, computed efficiently via automatic differentiation, and they employ self-adaptive loss balancing to tune…

item.title: Randomized Neural Networks for Integro-Differential Equations with Application to Neutron Transport
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Haoning Dang, Fei Wang, Yifan Chen, Zhouyu Liu, Dong Liu, Hongchun Wu
arXiv:2604.13830v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Integro-differential equations arise in a wide range of applications, including transport, kinetic theory, radiative transfer, and multiphysics modeling, where nonlocal integral operators couple the solution across phase space. Such nonlocality often introduces dense coupling blocks in deterministic discretizations, leading to increased computational cost and memory usage, while physics-informed neural networks may suffer from expensive nonconvex training and sensitivity to hyperparameter choices. In this work, we present randomized neural networks (RaNNs) as a mesh-free collocation framework for linear integro-differential equations. Because the RaNN approximation is intrinsically dense through globally supported random features, the nonl…

item.title: Replacing Gaussian Processes with Neural Networks in Pulsar Timing Array Inference of the Gravitational-Wave Background
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Shreyas Tiruvaskar, Chris Gordon
arXiv:2604.04340v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Bayesian inference of nanohertz gravitational-wave background models in pulsar timing array analyses often relies on Gaussian-process interpolators to avoid repeated, computationally expensive strain-spectrum calculations. However, Gaussian-process training becomes a bottleneck for large training sets. We test whether probabilistic neural networks can replace Gaussian processes in this role for both a self-interacting dark matter model and a phenomenological environmental model. We find that neural networks recover consistent posteriors while significantly reducing both training and Markov chain Monte Carlo runtime, with the largest gains for the more computationally demanding model.

item.title: 呼吸Kagome晶格上的偶极手性自旋液体
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Francisco Machado, Sabrina Chern, Michael P. Zaletel, Norman Y. Yao
该研究探讨了在呼吸Kagome晶格上长程偶极反铁磁相互作用如何稳定手性自旋液体。通过大规模密度矩阵重正化群计算支持了这一预言，并绘制了 surrounding 相图，提出了通过局域变化磁场进行绝热制备的路径。研究还识别了每个单胞中的低能自由度，并分析了有限尺寸团簇中的稳定性和特征，为在里德伯原子阵列和超冷极性分子阵列中直接测量手性边缘模式提出了实验可行的方案。

item.title: 平行磁场与旋转中不存在带电π介子凝聚
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Puyuan Bai, Lianyi He
该工作研究了在平行磁场中由旋转驱动的相对论性带电玻色-爱因斯坦凝聚的临界温度。对于非相互作用玻色子，由于系统呈准一维特性，临界温度消失，无法发生玻色-爱因斯坦凝聚；对于具有四次自相互作用的相互作用玻色子，序参量为零，非对角长程序在任何非零温度下均不存在，这与Coleman-Mermin-Wagner-Hohenberg定理一致。

item.title: 量子力学导论：面向宏观世界居住者
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Antonio Barletta
该工作为量子力学讲义，主要面向一维系统介绍基本概念，以避免复杂的数学和符号。内容主要基于Gasiorowicz（1974）的经典教材，同时参考了Phillips（2003）和Dirac（1981）的著作，强调严谨的理论方法与丰富的应用实例相结合，仅少量扩展到三维表述。

item.title: Analog-Digital Quantum Computing with Quantum Annealing Processors
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Rahul Deshpande, Majid Kheirkhah, Chris Rich, Richard Harris, Jack Raymond, Emile Hoskinson, Pratik Sathe, Andrew J. Berkley, Stefan Paul, Brian Barch, Daniel A. Lidar, Markus Müller, Gabriel Aeppli, Andrew D. King, Mohammad H. Amin
arXiv:2603.15534v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Quantum annealing processors typically control qubits in unison, attenuating quantum fluctuations uniformly until the applied system Hamiltonian is diagonal in the computational basis. This simplifies control requirements, allowing annealing QPUs to scale to much larger sizes than gate-based systems, but constraining the class of available operations. Here we expand the class by performing analog-digital quantum computing in a highly-multiplexed, superconducting quantum annealing processor. This involves evolution under a fixed many-body Hamiltonian that, in the weak-coupling regime, is well-described by an effective XY model, together with arbitrary-basis initialization and measurement via auxiliary qubits. Operationally, this is…

item.title: 二次量子混沌的复杂性
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Pallab Basu, Suman Das, Pratik Nandy
该研究探讨了具有随机相互作用的最小二体哈密顿量所产生的类高斯随机矩阵谱，即“二次量子混沌”。对应的硬核玻色子模型表现出真正的混沌动力学，在谱统计、Krylov复杂度及高阶Out-of-Time-Ordered关联子晚期衰减等方面与SYK模型相似。中谱本征态的分形维数和Stabilizer Renyi熵随系统尺寸增大趋于Haar随机，但受局域相互作用约束，呈现“弱混沌”特征。该模型为实验探测量子混沌提供了资源高效的候选方案。

item.title: 镍酸盐超导体中带宽与能带填充的调控
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 M. Kriener, C. Terakura, A. Kikkawa, Z. Liu, H. Murayama, M. Nakajima, Y. Fujishiro, S. Sasano, R. Ishikawa, N. Shibata, Y. Tokura, Y. Taguchi
该研究利用高压合成和静水压输运技术，系统研究了双层镍酸盐La₃Ni₂O₇体系中带宽与能带填充对超导性和其他特征性质的影响。增大NiO₆八面体倾斜度会将超导相推向更高压力，而同时引入空穴掺杂则逆转这一趋势。在非超导态中观察到最多三种不同的反常，可能与密度波形成有关。该工作强调了控制样品质量（如杂相和氧空位）对推进该领域的重要性。

item.title: Counting with the quantum alternating operator ansatz
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Julien Drapeau, Shreya Banerjee, Stefanos Kourtis
arXiv:2503.07720v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: We introduce a variational algorithm based on the quantum alternating operator ansatz (QAOA) for the approximate solution of computationally hard counting problems. Our algorithm, dubbed VQCount, is based on the equivalence between random sampling and approximate counting and employs QAOA as a solution sampler. We first prove that VQCount improves upon previous work by reducing exponentially the number of samples needed to obtain an approximation within an arbitrary small multiplicative factor of the exact count. Using tensor network simulations, we then study the typical performance of VQCount with shallow circuits on synthetic instances of two #P-hard problems, positive #NAE3SAT and positive #1-in-3SAT. We employ the original qua…

item.title: 量子共振条件下多体 kicked rotor 的波包动力学与纠缠
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Yangshuo Zhou, Jiao Wang
该研究考察了处于各自量子共振的多体相互作用量子 kicked rotor 系统，发现主共振与次级共振的相互作用催生了丰富的多体动力学。波包展宽与双体纠缠熵均呈现三种动力学区域：二次扩散、周期-2振荡及其混合，由相关势的对称性支配。研究还讨论了高阶共振效应、行为鲁棒性、向多体 kicked top 的推广及实验关联。

item.title: 一维缺陷网络中的涌现拓扑相
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Rahul Singh, Ritajit Kundu, Arijit Kundu, Adhip Agarwala
该研究表明，周期性调制缺陷阵列嵌入散射态可产生涌现对称性保护拓扑相，其性质可通过调节缺陷强度调控，称为Su-Schrieffer-Heeger网络。散射矩阵网络模型可捕捉涌现对称性与准能带非平庸缠绕，导致可区分的输运特征，并可进一步周期驱动实现鲁棒的Thouless电荷泵。微观晶格模型中的Bloch迷你带与网络问题直接对应，且该物理对无序稳定，可在具体固态实验平台实现。

item.title: Entanglement in a molecular Lieb-lattice quantum computing circuit: A tensor network study
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Wei Wu
arXiv:2604.13093v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Here a finite-Lieb-lattice quantum computing circuit consisting of spin-1/2 quantum bits (qubits) and triplet couplers is designed. Important gradient - quantum entanglement - is analysed. This type of design could be realised in a vast range of molecules containing multiple radicals, in which the communications among qubits are controlled by the optically driven triplets. The von Neumann entanglement entropy, reduced density matrices, and spin-spin correlations were computed using tensor-network methods by varying the magnetic anisotropy and external magnetic field. This work uncovers the rich entanglement patterns, quantum phase transitions, and tunable spin coherence in this mixed spin system, designed for molecular spin-based quantum com…

item.title: Excited-State Quantum Chemistry on Qumode-Based Processors via Variational Quantum Deflation
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Marlon F. Jost, Sijia S. Dong
arXiv:2604.13457v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Variational quantum algorithms on bosonic quantum processors are an emerging paradigm for quantum chemistry calculations, exploiting the natural alignment between molecular structure and harmonic oscillator-based hardware. We introduce the qumode-based variational quantum deflation framework (QumVQD) for finding both electronic and vibrational excited state energies on qumode-based architectures. For electronic structure, we incorporated particle number conservation constraints via Fock basis Hamming weight filtering. This symmetry enforcement achieves a significant reduction in computational overhead, scaling the Hilbert space dimension as OM ḩoose nₑ rather than O(2^M) for M spin orbitals and nₑ electrons. We validate the approach throug…

item.title: Experimental realisation of topological spin textures in a Penning trap
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Julian Y. Z. Jee, Nihar Makadia, Joseph H. Pham, Gustavo Café de Miranda, Michael J. Biercuk, Athreya Shankar, Robert N. Wolf
arXiv:2604.13872v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Quantum simulation with controllable many-body platforms offers a powerful route to exploring complex phases and dynamics that are difficult to access in natural materials. Among these, topological spin textures such as skyrmions are central to modern condensed-matter physics and play a key role in chiral quantum many-body systems. Their controlled realisation in large, programmable quantum platforms, however, remains an outstanding challenge. Here, we report deterministic generation and site-resolved reconstruction of topological spin textures in a two-dimensional crystal of more than 150 trapped ions. Using globally applied spin-dependent forces, we generate skyrmion configurations and reconstruct the full vector spin field with single-i…

item.title: 平带铁磁体中的假真空衰变：量子几何与手性边缘态的作用
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Fabian Pichler, Clemens Kuhlenkamp, Michael Knap
该工作提出了一种探测平带铁磁体中磁化动力学的非平衡方案，研究了巡游铁磁体和自旋极化陈绝缘体中假真空上磁泡的成核与动态生长。对于铁磁金属，强调非平庸量子几何在磁化动力学中的关键作用，并提供了探测量子度量的途径；对于量子霍尔铁磁体，展示了如何动态获取畴壁边界处手性边缘模式的性质。

item.title: Floquet混沌多体系统中的本真量子疤痕
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Harald Schmid, Andrea Pizzi, Johannes Knolle
该研究探讨了周期驱动Floquet多体系统中基于不稳定周期轨道的本真量子疤痕行为。在高频极限下，Floquet态保持疤痕特征；此外还发现了无静态对应的新颖驱动诱导Floquet疤痕。通过经典Lyapunov指数分析，构建了包含疤痕增强与猝灭区间的动力学稳定性相图，为调控量子多体系统的疤痕行为提供了新平台。

item.title: 无自旋-轨道耦合补偿磁体中的几何自旋简并
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Seung Hun Lee, Yuting Qian, Xi Dai, Bohm-Jung Yang
该工作为无自旋-轨道耦合的补偿磁体建立了理论框架，指出自旋简并可由几何约束而非自旋对称性保护。零净磁化强度为形式自旋简并能带节点的出现提供了强约束条件，即使不存在常规自旋对称性亦然。该框架适用于弱相互作用区域，为补偿亚铁磁中观测到的非传统自旋简并提供了统一描述，并拓展了对磁性相中能带简并的理解。

item.title: 薄膜交替磁性候选材料中的巨室温三阶电输运
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Hongyu Chen, Peixin Qin, Ziang Meng, Guojian Zhao, Kai Chen, Chuanying Xi, Xiaoning Wang, Li Liu, Zhiyuan Duan, Sixu Jiang, Jingyu Li, Xiaoyang Tan, Jinghua Liu, Jianfeng Wang, Huiying Liu, Chengbao Jiang, Zhiqi Liu
该研究在(101)取向的RuO₂薄膜（一种交替磁性候选材料）中观察到巨室温三阶电输运响应，且具有显著的量子几何贡献。交替磁性因自发破缺时间反演-半晶格平移和宇称-时间对称性，同时承载时间反演奇和偶的量子几何量。研究发现三阶霍尔效应与交替磁序密切相关，可作为探测奈尔矢量的有效手段。该工作不仅支持8 nm厚RuO₂薄膜中存在交替磁性，还表明交替磁体是探索量子几何和构建量子电子/自旋器件的多功能平台。

item.title: Holographic Representation of One-Dimensional Many-Body Quantum States via Isometric Tensor Networks
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Kaito Kobayashi, Benjamin Sappler, Frank Pollmann
arXiv:2512.11967v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Tensor network methods, most prominently matrix product states (MPS), have become fundamental tools in modern quantum many-body physics. While MPS and extensions like the multiscale entanglement renormalization ansatz (MERA) and tree tensor networks (TTN) efficiently capture area-law entanglement and its logarithmic violations, they inherently struggle to represent highly entangled wavefunctions. Specifically, reaching the volume-law regime typically demands exponential resources within these conventional frameworks. Motivated by this challenge, we propose holographic isometric tensor network states (holographic isoTNS) that simulate quantum lattice models in D spatial dimensions via (D+1)-dimensional networks of tensors. The addit…

item.title: 工程缺陷诱导磁化动力学中的混合微磁-原子模拟
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Nastaran Salehi, Olle Eriksson, Johan Hellsvik, Manuel Pereiro
该研究提出了一种三维多尺度混合微磁-原子模拟方法，通过引入两类人工设计的缺陷结构——双缝结构及各向异性可调的原子四面体团簇——来研究自旋波、畴壁和三维斯格明子的动力学行为。双缝结构产生了类似电子波的磁子干涉图样，而局域各向异性扰动则导致畴壁形变、管状/球状结构形成、斯格明子湮灭及呼吸模式等丰富现象，揭示了缺陷诱导各向异性相互作用在磁化动力学中的关键作用。

item.title: 内禀平均力哈密顿量与强耦合量子热力学
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Ignacio González, Sagnik Chakraborty, Ángel Rivas
该研究提出了一个适用于强耦合热环境的量子系统普适热力学框架。与先前方法不同，该框架在保持与弱耦合 regime 相同规范自由度的同时，保留了von Neumann熵的热力学表达式，并仅利用通过对系统微观控制可获取的变量来表述一般的第一和第二定律，增强了实验可行性。研究者通过将其应用于与结构化玻色库强耦合的典范模型验证了这一框架。

item.title: Tb₂Zr₂₋ₓTiₓO₇（x = 0, 0.5）中的低温自旋冻结与漫散射磁关联
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Sujata Singh, Leon Carstens, M. Duc Le, R. Klingeler, C. S. Yadav
该工作研究了磁受挫烧绿石体系Tb₂Zr₂O₇和Tb₂Zr₁.₅Ti₀.₅O₇的热力学行为与短程磁关联。母体Tb₂Zr₂O₇为缺陷萤石结构，Ti掺杂Zr位后向烧绿石相演化。两种化合物在0.4 K以下均无长程磁序，分别在1.25 K和1.05 K以下出现磁场依赖的自旋冻结。交流磁化率显示20 K以下存在慢自旋弛豫过程。非弹性中子散射观察到低温下的宽漫散射，表明存在短程磁关联，归因于局域结构畸变和持续的自旋涨落。

item.title: 手性覆盖层磁性薄膜中斯格明子的磁显微学
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Buddhika Hondamuni, Théo Balland, Fabian Kammerbauer, Ashish Moharana, Bindu, Amandeep Singh, Meital Ozeri, Shira Yochelis, Yossi Paltiel, Omkar Dhungel, Zeeshawn Kazi, Kai-Mei C. Fu, Hideyuki Watanabe, Mathias Kläui, Arne Wickenbrock, Nir Bar-Gill, Angela Wittmann, Dmitry Budker
该工作利用宽场氮空位中心磁测量技术，在室温下直接成像了手性分子功能化磁性薄膜中的斯格明子，实现了大范围磁杂散场的定量 mapping。通过像素分辨的光学探测磁共振结合可控磁场，研究者在CoFeB铁磁样品中可重复地成核和探测斯格明子态。实验发现斯格明子的直径、间距和形状存在对映选择性和磁场极性依赖的调制，表明可通过磁-手性耦合实现拓扑自旋纹理的分子级调控。

item.title: 孤立量子系统中指数长的预弛豫时间尺度
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Matteo Gallone
该研究探讨了d维格点上具有广延局域哈密顿量H=N+εP的孤立量子多体系统在ε≪1区域的预弛豫现象。证明预弛豫时间在ε₀/ε上呈指数增长，其中ε₀为有效谱隙宽度与P的局域范数之比；并证明在指数长时间内存在两个准守恒量，其误差指数小。

item.title: 探测自旋纠缠电子的实空间密度
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Federico Pisani, Leonie Spitz, Libor Vojáček, Flaviano José dos Santos, Alberto Carta, Bastien Dalla Piazza, Stanislav E. Nikitin, Karl W. Krämer, Björn Fåk, Taro Nakajima, Daichi Ueta, Hiraku Saito, Jian-Rui Soh, Nicola Marzari, Henrik M. Rønnow
该研究以孤立反铁磁海森堡二聚体为范例，展示了如何从非弹性中子散射（INS）强度的动量依赖中提取磁形状因子和磁电子密度分布。作者测量了醋酸铜单水合物中单重态-三重态激发的三维磁结构因子，用最小参数化方法从实验数据推导出自旋纠缠电子的实空间密度以及金属-配体间的磁电子密度转移。密度泛函理论计算定量复现了实验结构因子，为DFT破缺对称自旋密度提供了直接验证。

item.title: 低能量下量子物质具有弱纠缠
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Samuel J. Garratt, Dmitry A. Abanin
该工作针对具有固定能量期望值的量子多体态，构建了关于子系统（约占全系统一半）纠缠熵的上界。冯诺依曼纠缠熵的上界为两个同温虚构系统热熵之和的一半，在某些系统中还附加有面积律贡献。该有效温度随系统尺寸增大而降低。作为应用，作者证明无挫折系统的基态Schmidt秩受限于子系统哈密顿量基态简并度的上界，因此当零温热熵遵循面积律时，基态纠缠熵也遵循面积律。

item.title: Reachability Constraints in Variational Quantum Circuits: Optimization within Polynomial Group Module
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Yun-Tak Oh, Dongsoo Lee, Jungyoul Park, Kyung Chul Jeong, Panjin Kim
arXiv:2604.13735v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: This work identifies a necessary condition for any variational quantum approach to reach the exact ground state. Briefly, the norms of the projections of the input and the ground state onto each group module must match, implying that module weights of the solution state have to be known in advance in order to reach the exact ground state. An exemplary case is provided by matchgate circuits applied to problems whose solutions are classical bit strings, since all computational basis states share the same module-wise weights. Combined with the known classical simulability of quantum circuits for which observables lie in a small linear subspace, this implies that certain problems admit a classical surrogate for exact solution with each step ta…

item.title: UBe13中9Be核磁共振再探：巡游-局域二重性与高磁场下可能的费米面重构
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Rintaro Matsuki, Shoko Minami, Hisashi Kotegawa, Hisatomo Harima, Yoshinori Haga, Etsuji Yamamoto, Yoshichika Onuki, Hideki Tou
该研究对重费米子超导体UBe13单晶进行了新的9Be核磁共振（NMR）测量，磁场范围0.5–8 T。通过考虑UBe13非对称空间群的详细模拟，作者确定了一组新参数，能够重现高磁场下复杂的NMR谱线轮廓。分析表明经典偶极场具有显著影响，Knight位移与经典偶极位移的比较为巡游-局域二重性提供了微观支持证据。

item.title: Scalable framework for quantum transport across large physical networks
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Adam Burgess, Nicholas Werren, Erik M. Gauger
arXiv:2604.13704v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Accurately modelling many-body quantum transport systems poses a challenge both conceptually and computationally due to the growth of the Hilbert space and the multi-scale nature of the geometries and couplings present in most naturally occurring networks. A compounding complexity of such systems is that the environment typically plays a key role in the transport dynamics. Utilising variational unitary transformations that displace environmental degrees of freedom allows for the deployment of a second-order master equation capable of capturing the dynamics of intermediate and strongly coupled systems, which are ubiquitous in microscopic energy transport systems. However, direct implementations of this approach suffer from fundamental scala…

item.title: 量子自旋液体YbZn₂GaO₅中自旋子-规范相互作用导致的标度失效
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Shannon Gould, John Singleton, Rabindranath Bag, Sara Haravifard, Sheng Ran
该研究对量子自旋液体候选材料YbZn₂GaO₅的高场磁化强度进行了系统标度分析。5–70 K范围内磁化曲线呈现类量子临界点的标度不变性，而3 K以下标度破缺且无法通过简单调整临界指数恢复，此温度与μSR观测到的增强自旋关联一致。破缺形式与集体自旋子通过涌现规范场耦合的理论预期相符，表明磁化标度可作为探测低能涌现激发的敏感热力学手段。

item.title: 简单慢算符与量子热化
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Tian-Hua Yang, Sarang Gopalakrishnan, Dmitry A. Abanin
该工作建立了典型初态热化与局域算符动力学之间的严格关系。作者引入“简单慢算符”（SSO）概念，即与哈密顿量对易子较小且在小尺寸分量上显著的算符。研究表明，若典型低复杂度初态在时间尺度t内热化，则必存在在该时间尺度上近似守恒的SSO；反之，若不存在SSO，则典型初态会发生热化。通过引入算符相对于态系综的“系综方差范数”，作者将低纠缠系综中的算符范数与算符尺寸关联，从而建立了算符增长与热化之间的直接联系。

item.title: 旋转磁场通过自旋介导实现单向电荷密度波的滞后开关
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Zichao Chen, Shiyu Zhu, Kailin Xu, Ruwen Wang, Ningning Wang, Jianfeng Guo, Yunhao Wang, Xianghe Han, Zhongyi Cao, Jianping Sun, Hui Chen, Haitao Yang, Jinguang Cheng, Ziqiang Wang, Hong-Jun Gao
该工作在磁性kagome金属GdTi₃Bi₄中报道了通过面内磁场旋转对单向电荷密度波（CDW）取向进行确定性、滞后性切换的现象。原子分辨谱学揭示了两种3a₀×1a₀的CDW畴Q1和Q2，它们沿两个不同晶向呈60°夹角，并被原子级锐利的畴壁分隔。旋转磁场可驱动这两种CDW构型之间的可逆转变，呈现出具有显著滞后的稳健C₂对称相图。该滞后切换由外场诱导的反铁磁自旋重取向介导，揭示了可通过自旋-晶格耦合调控电荷序的可调能量景观。

item.title: 铱酸盐光学电导率中的自旋极化子特征
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Francesco Cassol, Léo Gaspard, Cyril Martins, Michele Casula, Benjamin Lenz
该研究挑战了5d⁵铱酸盐材料光学输运中双峰结构源于Hubbard子带的传统解释，提出基于自旋极化子（SP）准粒子的新图像，并将第一峰的主导特征归因于SP。以Ba₂IrO₄和Sr₂IrO₄为范例，结合动力学平均场理论和自洽Born近似，成功复现了角分辨光电子能谱和光学输运测量的非平庸特征；对于Sr₂IrO₄，该SP图像在轻掺杂区依然成立。

item.title: 应变介导的晶格重构增强Cr2Ge2Te6/WTe2范德华异质双层中的铁磁性
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Franz Herling, Mireia Torres-Sala, Dorye L. Esteras, Charlotte Evason, Motomi Aoki, Marcos Rosado, Kapil Gupta, Bernat Mundet, Kai Xu, J. Sebastián Reparaz, Kenji Watanabe, Takashi Taniguchi, Dimitre Dimitrov, Vera Marinova, Ivan A. Verzhbitskiy, Goki Eda, José H. Garcia, Stephan Roche, Juan. F. Sierra, Sergio O. Valenzuela
该工作研究了全二维Cr2Ge2Te6/WTe2（CGT/WTe2）异质结构，发现WTe2的引入显著增强了CGT的铁磁性。磁输运测量显示，反常霍尔效应稳健，居里温度提高逾两倍，矫顽场大幅增强。界面显微表征证实为化学突变的范德华界面，无显著互扩散。理论计算表明，界面电荷转移使CGT导电，而近邻诱导的晶格畸变增强了交换作用和磁晶各向异性。

item.title: 呈现宽反铁电SmC_A*相与玻璃化六角SmX_A*相的三元液晶混合物
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Aleksandra Deptuch, Anna Drzewicz, Marcin Piwowarczyk, Michał Czerwiński, Mateusz Filipow, Mateusz Pkaczek, Ewa Juszyńska-Gałkazka
该研究设计了一种三元液晶混合物，旨在获得玻璃态倾斜六角相。通过X射线衍射、电光、介电等多种手段研究了混合物及其纯组分的结构性质。确定了电子密度分布、螺距、选择性光反射等特征，并在SmX_A*相中观察到玻璃化转变。介电谱中未直接观察到主α弛豫，但检测到次级β和γ弛豫过程。结果表明该三元混合物能够稳定宽温区的反铁电SmC_A*相和玻璃化六角SmX_A*相。

item.title: 通过量子电容探测狄拉克材料中非厄米性的热力学特征
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Juan Pablo Esparza, Francisco J. Peña, Patricio Vargas, Vladimir Juričić
该工作提出了在狄拉克材料中以平衡态方式探测例外点物理的新途径：在弱非厄米 regime 下，热力学态密度和量子电容展现出通向例外点的普适平衡态行为。在最小非互易石墨烯模型中，跃迁不对称性使狄拉克速度降低为v_F = v√(1−β²)，导致低能量态密度、热力学态密度和量子电容在|β|→1⁻时均按(1−β²)⁻¹发散。在电荷中性点，量子电容保持对温度的线性依赖但前置因子发散；施加磁场时表现为朗道能级间距坍缩和热激活能级聚集。双正交Bloch态的Petermann因子同样呈现(1−β²)⁻¹的标度行为。

item.title: kagome金属GdTi₃Bi₄中磁各向异性的可调分岔与双取向反铁磁序
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Jianfeng Guo, Shiyu Zhu, Runnong Zhou, Ruwen Wang, Yunhao Wang, Jianping Sun, Zhen Zhao, Xiaoli Dong, Jinguang Cheng, Haitao Yang, Jiang Xiao, Hong-Jun Gao
该工作在准一维kagome反铁磁体GdTi₃Bi₄中观察到磁各向异性的可调分岔和双取向反铁磁序。通过直接可视化两个平台转变过程中的磁畴演化，揭示了沿a轴的显著面内各向异性。温度依赖表征显示在约2 K处发生各向异性分岔转变，a轴各向异性分裂为两个偏离高对称方向7°的特殊取向，暴露出隐藏的双取向面内反铁磁序。矢量磁场调制进一步清晰展示了分岔各向异性的特征，揭示了三类不同的磁响应行为。

item.title: 超声金属焊接状态监测中的自适应未知故障检测与小样本持续学习
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Ahmadreza Eslaminia, Kuan-Chieh Lu, Klara Nahrstedt, Chenhui Shao
该研究提出一种自适应状态监测方法，用于超声金属焊接（UMW）的未知故障检测与小样本持续学习。未知故障通过分析多层感知机的隐藏层表示并结合统计阈值策略进行检测；检测后，仅选择性更新网络末层，将新故障类型融入现有模型，同时保留已有知识。此外，利用余弦相似度变换与聚类算法加速新故障样本的标注过程。

item.title: 通过注入锁定光子网络实现分布式相干光计算
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Shenghan Gao, Kathy Lüdge, Francesco Da Ros, Nathan Youngblood
该工作提出了一种基于光注入锁定的分布式实时相干光计算新策略，可在无需光电或数模转换的情况下，对远程光源产生的光学数据进行相干处理。利用半导体激光器速率方程模型，研究了注入功率比、频率失谐及调制条件对稳定工作区的影响，发现较高注入功率可拓宽锁定裕度，但更易表现出与弛豫振荡相关的频率选择性特征。
